title: paspalum peckii
intro: Paspalum peckii, also known as 'Salt Grass', is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Paspalum peckii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In traditional herbal preparations, Paspalum peckii is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
